overview.description: Vietnam has 24M K-12 students and 2M+ university students. EdTech is booming post-COVID. AI applications include adaptive learning, AI tutoring bots, automated assessment, and student dropout prediction.
overview.marketSizeVietnam: ~$4B EdTech market; Vietnam ranks top 3 SEA for online learning growth
overview.marketSizeSEA: ~$40B EdTech market; strong demand for English learning, STEM, upskilling

domainKnowledge.typicalDataVolume: Medium — millions of learners on major platforms; engagement data rich
domainKnowledge.dataQuality: Medium — structured on modern LMS; poor on legacy school systems

painPoints.problem: One-size-fits-all curriculum fails diverse learners; personalization is manual
Teacher shortage limits 1:1 tutoring; AI tutors can fill the gap
Student dropout prediction is reactive; interventions come too late
Content search and discovery on large course platforms is poor

relatedNodes.description: EdTech and HR share upskilling and workforce development use cases.
